Verified bhuef.buaa.edu.cn, graduate.buaa.edu.cn, global.buaa.edu.cn, and lib.buaa.edu.cn as Beihang-controlled official domains by domain suffix and site branding.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery did not locate a central Beihang binding policy on generative-AI use, assessment, or academic integrity. The usable source was an official Beihang 2025 annual-news summary describing institutional digital-intelligence planning, AI applications, and AI curriculum signals; conference pages and an inaccessible library database listing were rejected for claim evidence.

artifacts.claimText: Beihang's official 2025 annual-news summary says the university issued a Digital Intelligence Empowerment Three-Year Action Plan (2025-2027) and deployed institutional AI/digital-intelligence applications; this source is not a binding generative-AI use policy.

artifacts.title: Beihang University (former BUAA) staged AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: Official-source crawl found no central binding Beihang generative-AI use, assessment, or academic-integrity policy. The staged candidates are limited to official annual-news source-status and teaching/curriculum signals, with conference pages and an inaccessible library database page rejected for policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central Beihang generative-AI academic-integrity, assessment, privacy, procurement, or approved-tool policy was located in this crawl.
The Beihang Library ScienceDirect AI page was not used as evidence because direct crawl access was blocked by the site's access policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
